Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default Judgment
Off Calendar May-20-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT ROBERT G. KOERNER'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The motion to vacate default is granted. The court finds excusable neglect. Defendant Robert G. Koerner shall respond to the complaint within three weeks. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
